ACFN Directory

Below you can search for a clinician that has a board designation from the ACFN.

FACFN = Fellow of the American College of Functional Neurology
FABBIR = Fellow of the American Board of Brain Injury & Rehabilitation
FABCDD = Fellow of the Childhood Disorders Development
FABES = Fellow of the Electrodignostic Specialties
FABHP = Fellow of the Human Performance
FABNN = Fellow of the Neurochemistry and Nutrition
FABVR = Fellow of the American Board of Vestibular Rehabilitation

Name Fellowships Clinic Name Clinic City Clinic State Countries Certification Years hf:categories hf:tax:country hf:tax:certification_year
